shortTermPromotion.dreaming.enabled.label: Enable Dreaming Promotion
shortTermPromotion.dreaming.enabled.help: Automatically schedule nightly short-term to long-term memory promotion.

shortTermPromotion.dreaming.cron.label: Dreaming Cron
shortTermPromotion.dreaming.cron.help: Cron expression for the managed dreaming job.

shortTermPromotion.dreaming.timezone.label: Dreaming Timezone
shortTermPromotion.dreaming.timezone.help: IANA timezone for the managed dreaming cron schedule.

shortTermPromotion.dreaming.limit.label: Promotion Limit
shortTermPromotion.dreaming.limit.help: Maximum short-term candidates promoted per dreaming run.

shortTermPromotion.dreaming.minScore.label: Promotion Min Score
shortTermPromotion.dreaming.minScore.help: Minimum weighted rank required for automatic promotion.

shortTermPromotion.dreaming.minRecallCou.label: Promotion Min Recalls
shortTermPromotion.dreaming.minRecallCou.help: Minimum recall count required for automatic promotion.

shortTermPromotion.dreaming.minUniqueQue.label: Promotion Min Queries
shortTermPromotion.dreaming.minUniqueQue.help: Minimum unique query count required for automatic promotion.
